test_output_summary: 31 passed in 1.59s — validates all doc file paths exist, task statuses are correct, doc sections are present, and documentation claims match actual code (manifest name field, max_files=5, max_tokens=3000, Stack Pattern Reference header, _append_template_patterns method).
implementation_notes:
Completed all four acceptance criteria for TASK-TPL-007 (Documentation updates):

1. AC-001: Added a comprehensive 'Template Pattern Context' section to the AutoBuild Instrumentation Guide (docs/guides/autobuild-instrumentation-guide.md). The section covers: overview and rationale, complete data flow diagram (manifest → resolver → selector → formatter → injection), key components table with file paths, manifest requirement (.claude/manifest.json `name` field), pattern selection rules (4-tier priority cascade), graceful degradation table (7 failure scenarios), structured logging examples, token impact table (5 template types), and relationship to other context sources. Also updated the File Locations table and Related Documentation links. Bumped version to 1.1.0.

2. AC-002: Updated TASK-DRF-F4B8 (F4B8a) with a resolution summary pointing at FEAT-TPL-PLAYER and TASK-TPL-007. Updated TASK-DOC-C3D7 (the documentation subtask) to status:completed with completion_note referencing TASK-TPL-007 and a banner directing readers to the instrumentation guide.

3. AC-003: Updated TASK-REN-B9F2 (F4B8b) to status:closed with closed_reason: 'Consumer exists, no rename needed. FEAT-TPL-PLAYER implemented the AutoBuild Player as the consumer of templates/*.template files. Per Decision D6...' Full rationale in frontmatter.

4. AC-004: Systematically verified all file paths across all 4 modified docs. All paths in the instrumentation guide resolve correctly (15 source files, 1 directory, 4 related docs). All relative markdown links in task files resolve. Created 31 automated tests validating paths and doc-code consistency.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Updates to AutoBuild guide are present and internally consistent with the code shipped in TASK-TPL-004.
completion_promises.evidence: Added 'Template Pattern Context' section to docs/guides/autobuild-instrumentation-guide.md. Section documents: data flow (manifest → resolver → selector → context injection), key components table (template_pattern_loader.py, resolver.py, autobuild_context_loader.py), manifest `name` field requirement (matches code: data.get('name')), selection rules (file-path hints → tech-stack → alphabetical → budget cap at max_files=5, max_tokens=3000 — all match code defaults), graceful degradation (7 scenarios matching code's never-raise contract), logging format ([TemplatePattern] prefix matching code), token impact table, and relationship to other context sources. Updated File Locations table with new component paths. Added FEAT-TPL-PLAYER feature spec to Related Documentation. Version bumped to 1.1.0.
